items.title: Roadtrip to England. I knew I wouldn't have a lot of time for light metering so I took the Canon...
items.content: Roadtrip to England. I knew I wouldn't have a lot of time for light metering so I took the Canon AE-1 and relied on TTL metering. 17 hours in the car...📷️ Canon AE-1 Program🎞️ Kodak Portra 160🔭 Canon FD 50mm/2.0👤 @Ameboid⚗️ Come Through Lab#BelieveInFilm #FilmPhotography #AnalogPhotography #35mm
items.author: @Gargron@mastodon.social
items.summary: A personal post discussing a road trip to England and analog film photography using a Canon AE-1 and Kodak Portra film.
items.reasoning: Completely off-topic; focuses on traditional film photography rather than AI/ML developments.
